The code does not perform any network calls, dynamic code execution, or handle untrusted data within this module.  \n- The only potential concern is if this code is misused elsewhere, but within this isolated context, the risk remains negligible.\n\n### Malware score justification:\n\n- The code is purely a utility for interacting with ERC20 tokens, with no embedded malicious behavior.  \n- The ABI and factory methods are standard and do not perform any malicious actions.  \n- The reports correctly assign a malware score of 0.\n\n---\n\n### Challenging assumptions about vulnerabilities:\n\n- All reports assume that because the code is autogenerated and standard, it is safe.
